name: Shanks
Effect: [Once Per Turn] This effect can be activated when your opponent attacks. Give up to 1 of your opponents Leader or Character cards −1000 power during this turn.

name: Shanks
Effect: Give all of your opponents Characters −1000 power.[Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)

name: Gol.D.Roger
Effect: [Rush] (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.) When your opponent activates [Blocker], if either you or your opponent has 0 Life cards, you win the game.

name: Silvers Rayleigh
Effect: [On Play] Select up to 2 of your opponent's Characters, and give 1 Character −3000 power and the other −2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less.
